sections.peakHoursDesc: Sales activity by hour of day

emptyChart.categoryMix: No categories with sales in this range

intro.title: 👋 Welcome to Avoqado!
intro.description: I'll give you a quick tour of the platform. We'll walk through the main sections — about 2 minutes. Press ESC any time to exit.

kpis.title: Your dashboard
kpis.description: Daily metrics: net sales, transactions, tips, and comparisons. The pulse of your business.

chatbot.title: Ask Avoqado AI
chatbot.description: Ask in plain English about your operation: sales, products, customers. The AI knows your data and answers instantly.

newProduct.title: Create products & services
newProduct.description: Build your catalog: categories, products, modifiers and bundles. Everything you sell lives here.

overview.title: Catalog
overview.description: Organize your menu with categories, modifiers and pricing — all from one place.

overview.title: Inventory
overview.description: Manage raw materials, recipes, suppliers and purchase orders. Keep stock current and know your true costs.

overview.title: Payments & orders
overview.description: Every transaction: payments, orders, links and virtual terminal. Filter by method, server, or date.

overview.title: Reservations
overview.description: Calendar, waitlist and online booking widget. Manage your guest flow.

overview.title: Team
overview.description: Invite servers, cooks, or managers. Assign roles, manage shifts and commissions.

overview.title: Customers
overview.description: Customer base, loyalty, reviews and promotions. Know and retain them.

overview.title: Reports
overview.description: Sales summary, by-item, available balance and more. Detailed insights, day after day.

overview.title: Settings
overview.description: Venue info, notifications, billing and integrations. Tour ends here — let's get to work!

setup.title: Set up your business to start selling

platformTour.title: Interactive platform tour
platformTour.description: See everything you can do in Avoqado in a 2-minute guided walkthrough.

catalog.title: Create your item catalog
catalog.description: Add categories and products or services to start charging customers.

inventory.title: Set up inventory
inventory.description: Register raw materials, recipes, and initial stock to track costs.

team.title: Invite your team
team.description: Add waiters, cooks, or managers and assign role-based permissions.

tpv.title: Register your terminals (POS)
tpv.description: Connect the devices where your team takes payments: PAX, tablets, or any compatible Android.

reservations.title: Activate reservations
reservations.description: Configure the calendar and online booking widget for your website.

payments.title: Activate online payments
payments.description: Connect Stripe to start accepting payments on your website, payment links, and reservations.

chatbot.title: How do I communicate with Avoqado AI?
chatbot.desc: Your AI assistant remains available from the sidebar button.
placeholders: How much did I sell yesterday?
How are my sales going this month?
What's my best-selling product this week?
How many tips have I made today?
How many reservations do I have today?
How do I create a discount?
What's my average ticket this month?
Can I temporarily pause online orders?
How do I add a product to the menu?
What were my peak hours this week?
How many new customers did I get this month?
What's my net profit this week?
How do I invite a new server?
How much do I owe in purchase orders?
chatbot.q2: When do I get the most new customers?
chatbot.q3: How do I add someone to my team?

trend.noCompare: No data from the previous period to compare

performance.title: Performance
performance.noData: No data available for the selected period

side.todaySettlementTooltip: Total charged today via card and digital payments. Excludes cash (already in your hand). Final amount may vary due to fees and bank processing times.
side.contextDescription: Data for {{date}} with the selected comparison.

businessCenter.title: Explore and configure features to grow your business
